message:
fix: use point dimensions and contentsScale for correct retina rendering

- Set layer contentsScale to scale factor for proper retina backing
- Create window at point dimensions (CSS pixels) not pixel dimensions
- Use actual scale_factor instead of 1.0 so ghostty renders correctly
- Process input at 8ms intervals (125Hz) while keeping frames at 30fps
- Use container size for panel creation since canvas may be hidden
- Remove skipNextResize, track size sent in create to avoid duplicates
